description: Statistical data on fertility rates in participating nations, used to understand demographic trends and potential impact on child-rearing costs and societal well-being. Intended audience: Project team, for strategic planning and contextual analysis.
steps_to_find: Contact national statistical offices.
Search World Bank Open Data.
Access UN data repositories.
access_difficulty: Easy. Readily available from public sources.

description: Economic indicators, specifically GDP data, for participating nations. Used to assess the economic context and potential impact on project feasibility and sustainability. Intended audience: Project team, for financial planning and risk assessment.

Contact national statistical offices.
access_difficulty: Easy. Readily available from public sources.

description: Data on housing price trends and affordability in Germany, specifically Bonn. Used to understand the housing market context and potential impact on participant recruitment and retention. Intended audience: Project team, for strategic planning and risk assessment.
steps_to_find: Search German Federal Statistical Office (Destatis).
Contact local real estate agencies.
Review reports from German banks and financial institutions.
access_difficulty: Medium. Requires searching specific databases and contacting agencies.

description: Current zoning regulations for the city of Bonn, Germany. Used to understand the permissible uses of land and buildings in the area. Intended audience: Project team, for facility planning and regulatory compliance.
steps_to_find: Contact the Bonn city planning department.
Review the city's official zoning map.
Consult with a local real estate lawyer.
access_difficulty: Medium. Requires contacting local government and potentially consulting with legal experts.

description: Policies and guidelines related to research conducted at the University Hospital Bonn. Used to ensure compliance with institutional regulations. Intended audience: Project team, for regulatory compliance.
steps_to_find: Contact the University Hospital Bonn research administration office.
Review the hospital's website for research policies.
Consult with the hospital's legal department.
access_difficulty: Medium. Requires contacting the hospital administration.

document_name: German Building Codes and Safety Regulations
description: Current building codes and safety regulations in Germany, specifically applicable to residential properties. Used to ensure compliance with safety standards during facility renovation. Intended audience: Project team, for facility planning and regulatory compliance.
steps_to_find: Contact the local building authority in Bonn.
Review the German Institute for Standardization (DIN) standards.
Consult with a local architect or engineer.
access_difficulty: Medium. Requires contacting local government and potentially consulting with experts.

description: The American Academy of Sleep Medicine (AASM) scoring manual, used as the standard for scoring sleep studies. Intended audience: Research Technicians, Sleep Neurophysiology Postdoctoral Researcher, for data annotation and analysis.
steps_to_find: Purchase the manual from the AASM website.
Access the manual through a library subscription.
Obtain a copy from a sleep medicine physician.
access_difficulty: Easy. Requires purchase or subscription.

description: The Brain Imaging Data Structure (BIDS) specification for EEG data, used to ensure data is stored in a standardized format. Intended audience: Data Engineer, for data management and sharing.
steps_to_find: Access the BIDS website.
Review the BIDS specification document.
Consult with BIDS experts.
access_difficulty: Easy. Available online.

description: A list of regional neurologist networks and contact information in the Bonn area. Used for participant recruitment. Intended audience: Study Coordinator, for participant recruitment.
steps_to_find: Contact the University Hospital Bonn neurology department.
Search online directories of neurologists.
Contact the Deutsche Gesellschaft für Schlafforschung und Schlafmedizin.
access_difficulty: Medium. Requires contacting organizations and searching directories.

document_name: Deutsche Gesellschaft für Schlafforschung und Schlafmedizin (DGSM) Membership Directory
description: A directory of members of the German Sleep Society (DGSM). Used for participant recruitment and networking. Intended audience: Study Coordinator, for participant recruitment.
steps_to_find: Access the DGSM website.
Contact the DGSM membership office.
Attend DGSM conferences.
access_difficulty: Medium. Requires accessing the DGSM website or contacting the organization.

document_name: List of Patient Advocacy Groups for Sleep Disorders
description: A list of patient advocacy groups for sleep disorders in Germany. Used for participant recruitment and community engagement. Intended audience: Study Coordinator, for participant recruitment and community engagement.
steps_to_find: Search online directories of patient advocacy groups.
Contact the DGSM.
Contact the University Hospital Bonn sleep clinic.
access_difficulty: Medium. Requires searching directories and contacting organizations.

description: The General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) as implemented in Germany. Used to ensure compliance with data privacy regulations. Intended audience: Legal Counsel, Data Engineer, for data management and security.
steps_to_find: Search the official GDPR website.

Review guidelines from the German data protection authority.
access_difficulty: Easy. Available online.

document_name: List of Local Contractors for Renovation

Contact local real estate agencies.
Obtain referrals from the University Hospital Bonn facilities department.
access_difficulty: Easy. Available online.

description: Technical specifications and operating manuals for all equipment used in the research unit (PSG, video-EEG, sensors). Used for equipment maintenance and troubleshooting. Intended audience: Data Engineer, Research Technicians, for equipment maintenance.
